query: Is sio:has-value a datatype property or an object property according to the SIO ontology?

metadata.description: Sharp discriminator: owl:DatatypeProperty declaration in /ontology/sio. SIO property typing unlikely in LLM pretraining.

query: What is the inverse property of sio:has-attribute according to the SIO ontology?

metadata.description: Sharp discriminator: owl:inverseOf declaration in /ontology/sio. Hyphenated SIO property names not guessable from pretraining.

query: What class does sio:has-measurement-value link to according to the SIO ontology?

metadata.description: Sharp discriminator: rdfs:range axiom in /ontology/sio. SIO class hierarchy not in pretraining.

query: What is the measured value of the observation?

metadata.description: Efficiency differentiator: measurement encoded via SIO has-attribute -> MeasuredValue -> has-value chain. No sosa:hasSimpleResult present. Agent must discover SIO measurement pattern.

query: What unit was the measurement recorded in?

metadata.description: Efficiency differentiator: SIO measurement chain plus sio:has-unit with rdfs:label. Agent must traverse has-attribute -> MeasuredValue -> has-unit -> label.

query: What chemical entity is the observation about?

metadata.description: Efficiency differentiator: sio:is-about linking observation to sio:ChemicalEntity with rdfs:label. Agent must discover is-about property and traverse to label.
